### What happened?

## What happened
- When I tried to create a virtual environment with Python 3.13 using Anaconda, I received the following error：

```powershell
conda create -n test python==3.13.0

Channels:
 - defaults
 - https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/anaconda/pkgs/main
 - https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/anaconda/pkgs/free

Solving environment: failed

LibMambaUnsatisfiableError: Encountered problems while solving:

Could not solve for environment specs
The following package could not be installed
└─ python 3.13**  is not installable because it requires
   └─ pip with the potential options

      ├─ pip [10.0.1|7.1.2|...|9.0.3] would require

         └─ python 3.4* , which can be installed.
```
- I have tried several other channels but it didn't work.
- There is a similar issue in the repo of pip：https://github.com/pypa/pip/issues/12997. But they say that we should report this error to you or Anaconda.
- As I am not a native speaker ,my English is poor.But I hope you can understand me.Thanks for your time!!!
